zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Dutton於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton25歲，母親Lady Alice Prescott19歲。他和Agnes FitzAlured至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1208年享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Dutton于大约1150年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton25岁，母亲Lady Alice Prescott19岁。他和Agnes FitzAlured至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1208年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Dutton was born about 1150, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, was 25 and his mother, Lady Alice Prescott, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes FitzAlured. He died in 1208, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Dutton est né environ 1150, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Prescott, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes FitzAlured. Il est décédé en 1208, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Dutton um 1150 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton 25 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Prescott 19. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzAlured mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1208 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Dutton è nato il circa 1150 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Prescott, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Agnes FitzAlured. Morì nel 1208, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Duttonが約1150年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Duttonは25歳，母Lady Alice Prescottは19歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzAluredとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1208年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Dutton(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Prescott(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzAlured(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Dutton, Lancashire, England: Dutton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Dutton nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Prescott, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Agnes FitzAlured. Ele faleceu em 1208, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Dutton родился около 1150 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Prescott, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Agnes FitzAlured. Он умер в 1208 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Dutton nació aproximadamente 1150, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Prescott, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Agnes FitzAlured. Murió en 1208, a la edad de 59 años.
